# Tax Skill Manifest

## Purpose

Answer tax-domain questions using minimal context loading.

## Boundaries

- In scope: tax business rules, tax implementation details, shopping/availability tax behavior.
- Out of scope: generic C# standards review, unrelated pricing modules, unrelated OHIP flows.

## Primary Files by Concern

- Business: `TAX_CALCULATION_BUSINESS_GUIDE.md`
- Developer: `TAX_CALCULATION_DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md`
- Shopping quick: `TAX_CALCULATION_SHOPPING_QUICK_GUIDE.md`
- Shopping deep: `TAX_CALCULATION_SHOPPING_AVAILABILITY.md`

## Loading Objective

Start with one file only, then escalate when exact evidence is required.
